headline: Wellington Management to Acquire Hartford Funds from The Hartford
summary: BOSTON & HARTFORD, Conn., June 03, 2026--Wellington Management ("Wellington"), one of the world’s leading independent investment managers, and The Hartford (NYSE: HIG), today announced they have entered into a definitive agreement under which Wellington will acquire Hartford Funds, a leading provider of investment solutions for the wealth management market.
